full_history.method: C EFORK trajectory comparison under its stated memory contract
full_history.notes: This measures finite-time geometric persistence; hiddenness is evaluated separately with the same memory contract.

finite_window.method: C EFORK trajectory comparison under its stated memory contract
finite_window.notes: This measures finite-time geometric persistence; hiddenness is evaluated separately with the same memory contract.

interpretation: These computations are retained as diagnostics of rejected regimes and do not support hidden chaotic attractor claims.
